text:
I need to first calculate the travel time for a 526 km trip at 60 km/h using the trip_plan tool. I will assume a fuel consumption rate to satisfy the tool's requirements, as it is not relevant to the final comparison.
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "trip_plan", "arguments": {"distance_km": 526, "speed_kmh": 60, "consumption_per_100km": 10}, "label": "$var1"}]</tool_call_answer>
